summary: The test suite comprehensively covers all seven requirements from the task description: artifact creation, retention policy creation, age-based eviction, size-based eviction, keep-latest-N-per-workflow eviction, combined deletion plan generation, and dry-run mode. Edge cases are well-represented: empty input lists tested in every Describe block, negative size and empty name rejections, zero-value policy parameters, boundary extremes (MaxAgeDays=1 vs 3650, size limit below smallest artifact, KeepLatestPerWorkflow=1), deduplication of multi-policy candidates, and mutual exclusivity of retain/delete sets. Reference dates are pinned for determinism. The BeforeEach fixtures are clean and the test names are descriptive. Minor rigor gaps include: no null/undefined parameter tests, no test for Format-DeletionPlanSummary with an all-retain plan (zero deletions), no coverage of MaxTotalSizeBytes=0 validation, and no assertion on the artifact count reported in the Summary string. Design is solid but Script:-scoped fixture variables, while valid in Pester, can leak across tests if run in certain configurations. Overall this is a high-quality suite that would reliably catch regressions across all core policy logic.
